description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist white facade, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a well-manicured lawn. The front yard includes a driveway with a blue car parked, a pathway leading to the main entrance, and a small set of steps. The rear of the property showcases a private garden area with lush greenery and a purple-flowering shrub, as well as a circular hot tub and a rectangular swimming pool. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, maximizing natural light and providing views of the outdoor spaces. The rooftop includes additional open areas, possibly for leisure or utility purposes. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a driveway, garden, hot tub, and pool, all enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a blue car, steps, and a manicured lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden, purple-flowering shrub, and the rear pool and hot tub area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, hot tub, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, side lawn, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
